preferred_name: Ratio radiation thermometer with two independent detectors

preferred_name_ml.en: Ratio radiation thermometer with two independent detectors

definition: ratio radiation thermometer with two detectors, in which the radiation is divided with a beam splitter and two filters into two distinct spectral ranges

definition_ml.en: ratio radiation thermometer with two detectors, in which the radiation is divided with a beam splitter and two filters into two distinct spectral ranges
definition_ml.de: Verhältnis-Strahlungsthermometer mit zwei Detektoren, in dem die Strahlung mit einem Strahlteiler und mit zwei Filtern in zwei getrennten Wellenlängenbereiche aufgeteilt wird
